summary: Focused on building a SaaS crypto algorithmic trading platform with AI and neural network capabilities. Also developed custom firmware for ESP32-S3 HID devices and a Windows kernel-level input filter driver.

items.title: SaaS crypto trading platform
items.description: Polished deployment configuration and authentication for the trading platform.

items.title: ESP32-S3 HID firmware
items.description: Developed new firmware versions with USB and BLE HID capabilities.

items.title: Windows input filter driver
items.description: Built a kernel-level driver for keyboard and mouse capture and injection.

items.title: Windows file-tagging utility
items.description: Maintained the file-tagging Explorer extension, including CI/CD and Store publishing.

items.title: Android TTS engine
items.description: Enhanced the text-to-speech engine with multiple voice models and intonation controls.

items.title: Crypto trading platform features
items.description: Iterated on billing, strategy templates, security hardening, and deployment pipeline.

items.title: HID firmware variant
items.description: Worked on a new firmware variant for the ESP32-S3 device.

items.title: File-tagging utility maintenance
items.description: Continued maintenance of the Windows Explorer tagging tool.

items.title: Firmware development
items.description: Continued development of the ESP32-S3 HID firmware.

items.title: Crypto prediction model research
items.description: Experimented with mixture-of-experts architectures for price prediction.

items.title: On-device LLM assistant
items.description: Built an Android assistant with local LLM, tool use, and delegation.

items.title: File-tagging utility updates
items.description: Worked on the Windows file-tagging tool, including CI/CD and Store publishing.

items.title: HID firmware updates
items.description: Continued development of the ESP32-S3 HID firmware.

items.title: Poker computer vision
items.description: Developed a CV pipeline for online poker hand history reconstruction.

items.title: Telegram trading bot
items.description: Built a Telegram bot for managing Freqtrade trading instances.

items.title: Autonomous AI coding tool
items.description: Developed an autonomous multi-session AI coding assistant with worktree management.

items.title: HID firmware earlier versions
items.description: Worked on earlier versions of the ESP32-S3 HID firmware.

items.title: Trading strategy development
items.description: Developed and optimized trading strategies for Freqtrade.

items.title: Telegram assistant bot
items.description: Worked on a Telegram bot for content summarization and forwarding.
